name: stech/steps
title: Steps
description: Numbered process grid — a short set of steps to complete, e.g. how to get enrolled.

steps_items.steps_items_text: Schedule a tour or meet with an academic advisor to get your questions answered.
Creating a student account is free and helps us get you enrolled. Set yours up in minutes.
We'll help you explore aid options, from Pell Grants and scholarships to VA benefits.
Enroll in person at our Cedar City campus, then start your hands-on training.
